name: Projects
description: Project / campaign / account workspaces — multi-step initiatives with their own context, timeline, decisions, and audit trail. Tasks link here via the project field; conversations and signals can also be project-scoped.

properties.description: Name of this project / campaign / account workspace. Primary key — used by tasks (via project field) and recall. Set once. Examples: 'Q2 Manufacturing Outreach', 'Onboarding Redesign', 'Account: Meridian Health'.
Category. Campaign = outbound sequence. Project = multi-step initiative with tasks and milestones. Account = workspace dedicated to a key contact/company. General = catch-all.
One sentence describing what this workspace is and why it exists. Set once. NOT a living summary — that belongs in Context.

The current-state summary. The 'start here' for anyone engaging — what's happening right now, what matters, what to do next. 1-3 paragraphs. REPLACES on each update; this is a living summary, not a history.
Chronological timeline of events — actions taken, observations, milestones. Each entry: { author, type (observation|action|change|milestone), summary, details, timestamp }. Append-only.
Knowledge base — observations, analysis, ideas, references. Each entry: { author, content, category (observation|analysis|idea|reference|question), timestamp }. Append-only.

Choices made with full reasoning — the explainability layer. Each entry: { question, decision, reasoning, alternatives, confidence (low|medium|high), autonomous (boolean), approvedBy, timestamp }. Append-only. If a decision is reversed, add a new entry explaining why.
Outbound communications audit. Each entry: { channel, recipient, subject, summary, step, sentAt, sentBy, status }. Append-only — never alter comms history.
Periodic summaries synthesizing activity, results, recommendations. Each entry: { title, content (markdown), period, generatedBy, audience, highlights, timestamp }. Append-only.
Current state. Operations MUST update before and after execution.
User ID, agent slug, or 'system' for automated. Use 'any' when unassigned.
Urgency: urgent (act now), high (today), normal (this week), low (when available).
Project / campaign target completion date. NOT a task due date — task deadlines live on each Tasks record.
Primary channel for this project's work, when applicable.
workspace_name of the parent project. Enables nesting (campaign → sub-campaigns, project → sub-projects).
